## Page

Minimal setup to run web page with 'atari-monk-light-engine'.

```html
{{include:index.html}}
```

```css
{{include:index.html}}
```

Import styles in 'src/main.ts'

```ts
import "./styles.css";
```

### Favicon

- 512x512 png with transparent background
- gamepad shape image generated with ai
- layers fit to size with gimp
